历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 6422 → 1824 → 2473 → 4513 → 3813, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2022, it moved sharply forward to 1824, then gradually shifted backward. The baseline for 2025 is around 3813. The provincial enrollment plan for science (physics category) was 56 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 45 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 48, a slight expansion of about 6.7% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 10th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top national universities. In 2025, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory conditions sparked discussion), and in 2024, it was slightly negative (rumors about teacher ethics), but no major negative events were seen in 2026 reputation data. Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with moderate to high overall exposure. It has 13 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, with extremely strong engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other flagship majors of Xi'an Jiaotong University continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is 377,900, with an estimated 229,200 in the physics category based on the 2025 proportion, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 173,282 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi, with a recruitment proportion in Yunnan province of about 1.5%–2%. It is not a local university, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3813, the 2026 expansion of 6.7% slightly easing competition, but the significant increase of about 32% in provincial physics category examinees sharply intensifying competition, stable and slightly positive reputation, and continued high popularity of flagship majors, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4016, with a range of 3558–4474.

Xi'an Jiaotong University's engineering strength is top in the country, with A+ disciplines like Electrical, Mechanical, and Control offering excellent employment prospects. High-scoring candidates are recommended to prioritize these.

学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, one of the first batch of key construction universities in the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and a Class A university in the national 'Double First-Class' construction. Its medical department has a long history, with strong disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine, enjoying a high reputation nationwide, and continues to attract strong interest from candidates.
